chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 989 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.1001/2023 (C/A) 12.04.2023 Mr. J. K. Jarwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Asadullah Khokhar, Assistant Commissioner, Taluka Mehrabpur, District Naushahro Feroze..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned A.A.G. files statement of respondent/alleged contemnor No.1, which reflects that in compliance of order dated 31.08.2022 passed by this Court, action has been taken against the delinquent officer by issuing him show-cause notice and final show-cause notice. Moreover, report has also been furnished by Deputy Commissioner, Naushahro Feroze stating therein that the stamp vendor license of respondent No.10 has also been cancelled. The copies of the aforesaid statement/report are supplied to learned Counsel for the petitioner, who being satisfied does not press the listed contempt application, which stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
